description: A blazing fast, multi-protocol download manager powered by a Rust engine. HTTP/HTTPS/FTP/BitTorrent/HLS with intelligent segmentation, resume, speed control, browser extension, aria2-compatible JSON-RPC and an MCP endpoint. (alternative to Internet Download Manager, aria2)

tips.before_install: First launch generates an admin token printed once in the container log: `docker logs fluxdown-server 2>&1 | grep -i token`. The management API and MCP endpoint require this token.

author: zerx-lab
title: FluxDown
